name: XposedOrNot_BreachAnalytics
author: XposedOrNot
description: Detailed XposedOrNot breach analytics for an email address: per-breach detail (date, records, exposed data classes, password-storage risk), first/latest exposure and overall risk. Free, no API key required.

configurationItems.name: key
configurationItems.description: Optional XposedOrNot API key (console.xposedornot.com) for higher rate limits and detailed responses. The analyzer is fully functional without it.
